title: Bring a Cat from China to the USA (2026 Guide)
content: Importing a cat from China requires a 15-digit ISO microchip and a rabies certificate. You must also obtain an official exit health certificate from the local Customs Bureau (Hai Guan) within 14 days of your flight.

title: Bring a Dog from China to the USA (2026 Guide)
content: Dogs from China are considered 'High-Risk' by the CDC. You must have a valid CDC Dog Import Permit or a CDC Vaccination Reservation. Ensure your dog is at least 6 months old before travel.

title: Cost to Bring a Pet to the USA (2026 Estimate)
content: Expect to pay between $1,000 and $4,500. Costs include airline pet fees ($200-$400 in-cabin), cargo shipping ($1,500+), and vet fees for USDA-style endorsements.
